# Stefan Eskam

> Change & delivery leadership for senior leaders in complex organisations. Closing the gap between strategy and execution, without adding governance overhead.

Stefan Eskam is an operational change and delivery leader with twenty years across regulated and product organisations (Danske Bank, SDC, 3Shape). The site offers a free ebook, short essays on delivery, and a direct contact line.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Stefan's positioning and approach.
- [About](/about): Background, career, and philosophy.
- [How I Work](/how-i-work): The four-phase approach to closing the strategy-to-delivery gap.
- [Writing](/writing): Short essays on delivery, change, and leadership.
- [Ebook](/ebook): Free download — "Notes From The Whiteboard", three chapters.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, LinkedIn, and a direct enquiry form.

## Essays

- [The Plan Wasn't the Problem](/writing/the-plan-wasnt-the-problem): Why plans erode through reasonable exceptions.
- [You Don't Change Behaviour by Explaining It](/writing/you-dont-change-behaviour-by-explaining-it): Behaviour follows consequence, not communication.
- [The Gap Has a Name](/writing/the-gap-has-a-name): The structural distance between strategy and delivery.
